title: Run Quiet NPC Portrait Set
sharedPrompt: Use all nine uploaded Quiet artworks as mandatory style and quality references. npcs.name: Commander Park Jae-won
npcs.title: Bureau Domain Response Commander
npcs.firstImpression: Calm enough to make a collapsing map feel like a problem with an answer.
npcs.reputation: A veteran response commander known for disciplined containment work and an unwillingness to spend civilian lives for cleaner reports.

npcs.name: Dr. Serin Hayashi
npcs.title: Domain Researcher
npcs.firstImpression: Already three conclusions ahead, and more frightened of a bad assumption than the thing in the specimen case.
npcs.reputation: A brilliant field researcher whose theories treat the Gloamreach as a system of laws rather than ordinary terrain.

npcs.reputation: The Outpost's controlled and pragmatic commander, known for choosing fast, ugly action over clean delay.

npcs.firstImpression: Friendly enough to lower the price, observant enough to know why you need it lowered.
npcs.reputation: A reliable broker of hidden salvage and hard-to-find supplies who is considered fair in business and incomplete in every answer.

npcs.reputation: An ancient guardian of the Obsidian Spire that is said to test claimants through judgment rather than immediate violence.
